visualizationDetails.title: Predicted Race Pace
visualizationDetails.description: Model-projected race pace and finishing spread across the full grid.

visualizationDetails.title: Feature Importance
visualizationDetails.description: Relative impact of each input feature for Gradient Boosting and XGBoost.

visualizationDetails.title: Team Strength vs Pace
visualizationDetails.description: Relationship between constructor strength and projected race pace.

visualizationDetails.title: Clean-Air Pace vs Prediction
visualizationDetails.description: How baseline clean-air pace translates to projected race performance.

visualizationDetails.title: Predicted Lap-Time Distribution
visualizationDetails.description: Team-level distribution of projected race lap times.

visualizationDetails.title: Prediction Confidence
visualizationDetails.description: Confidence bands by driver based on model uncertainty and volatility signals.

visualizationDetails.title: Win Probability Board
visualizationDetails.description: Model win probabilities with implied fair decimal odds for market benchmarking.

visualizationDetails.title: Podium Probability Board
visualizationDetails.description: Monte-Carlo podium probabilities derived from projected pace and uncertainty.

visualizationDetails.title: Finish Probability Heatmap
visualizationDetails.description: Driver-by-position probability matrix for the top 10 finish slots.

visualizationDetails.title: Head-to-Head Edge Matrix
visualizationDetails.description: Pairwise probability that one driver finishes ahead of another.

visualizationDetails.title: Risk-Reward Matrix
visualizationDetails.description: Driver risk-versus-upside profile using uncertainty, win chance, and expected points.

visualizationDetails.title: Circuit Speed Map
visualizationDetails.description: FastF1-derived circuit map with corner labels and speed profile.

visualizationDetails.title: Historical Lap-Time Distribution
visualizationDetails.description: Historical lap-time spread from prior seasons at this circuit.

visualizationDetails.title: Historical Tyre Strategy
visualizationDetails.description: Compound usage and stint tendencies from historical race data.

visualizationDetails.title: Pit Strategy Comparison
visualizationDetails.description: Monte-Carlo race-time simulation across strategic pit-stop options.

visualizationDetails.title: Tyre Degradation Curves
visualizationDetails.description: Projected soft/medium/hard degradation behavior and cliff laps.
